message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ParticipantFontColor #000000
  ParticipantFontSize 18
  MessageFontSize 22
  MessageFontStyle italic
  ArrowColor #000000
}

participant Issuer as Issuer
participant Contract as Contract

Issuer -> Contract : Revoke(h(Root_{ct}), reason)

Contract -> Contract : MarkCredentialAsRevoked(h(Root_{ct}))
Contract -> Contract : Event : CredentialRevoked(h(Root_{ct}), reason, timestamp)

@enduml
